narrative:
Mason Twp. township has 703 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.0 percentage points.
